programmes.show_description: Tense thriller with Robert De Niro. An unbalanced baseball fan takes hero worship to dangerous extremes while attempting to help a player get over a recent slump. (1996)
Sci-fi action with Tia Carrere (Relic Hunter, True Lies). When a shower of meteors threatens to destroy life on Earth, can a bold plan by a group of geniuses save the planet? (2014)
Welcome to LEGEND XTRA - your home for movies and series full of action, adventure, suspense and much more!
An aged recluse hides from death in an abandoned building, but soon discovers he cannot evade his fate. S3, Ep16
A wealthy man devises a bizarre and complex plan to redress the balance for past injustices. S3, Ep17
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A down-and-out discovers a pair of dead man's shoes have a mind of their own. S3, Ep18
A drowned man mysteriously awakes to follow his own funeral procession. S3, Ep19
Spaghetti Western with Terence Hill. A band of gunslingers and a troupe of circus performers form an unexpected alliance to help a prospecting town to fight back against a greedy landowner. (1969)
Adaptation of the classic adventure yarn, starring Patrick Swayze as courageous Allan Quatermain, who is employed to locate the mine and uncover the truth behind the legends. Ep1

Adventurer Allan Quatermain plunges into the unexplored recesses of the African jungles to uncover the truth behind the legends concerning the mine. Ep2
Welcome to LEGEND XTRA - your home for movies and series full of action, adventure, suspense and much more!
Colt is set to testify against a gangster who tried to bribe a city safety inspector, but the accused has some strong-arm tactics up his sleeve. S3, Ep8
Colt is caught in the middle of a pirate record operation while helping the son of an old friend who has been arrested for murder. Guest starring Dottie West. S3, Ep9
A corrupt police officer resorts to kidnapping the wife of a small-statured stuntman to retrieve a cocaine package stuck in a vent. S3, Ep10
Colt and his friend Pat's race-car is stolen after two dubious men are told the vehicle is not for sale. Guest starring David Carradine. S3, Ep11
Colt tries to prove the innocence of a former stuntman, now wheelchair-bound, who jumped bail on a murder charge and fled to Seattle. S3, Ep12
Disaster drama with James Stewart. After a plane carrying valuable art is hijacked, the passengers find themselves in more peril when it crashes into an oil rig and plunges into the ocean. (1977)
Horror film written and directed by cult author Stephen King. When machines in an American backwater town start coming to life and kill people, the humans have to fight for their lives. (1986)
Action with David Carradine. As the Vietnam War comes to an end, one man embarks on a life-threatening mission to free a group of American prisoners held in a secret Vietcong camp. (1986)
Action drama starring Stephen Baldwin. When an asteroid impact on the moon threatens all life on Earth, only one demolition expert can save humankind... (2006)
